/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ExtractGraph.cpp.o -o main   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_core.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgproc.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_highgui.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_videoio.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_ximgproc.dylib
